title: Bhoomi
desc: After his daughter is brutally raped and the attackers are acquitted, a father decides to take revenge and bring the perpetrators to justice.

title: Kotha Bangaru Lokam
desc: Swapna, who belongs to a wealthy family, falls in love with Balu, a middle-class boy. Problems ensue when Swapna's father learns about their relationship.

title: Skanda: The Attacker
desc: After Rayudu and Ranjith Reddy's children elope, the CMs turn against each other. However, when a college student kidnaps Reddy's daughter, a revenge saga unravels.

title: Bhale Bhale Magadivoy
desc: Lucky, an amnesiac scientist, is in love with Nandana, who is unaware of his condition. Things take a turn when he has to convince her parents for their marriage.

title: Tillu Square
desc: After a year of getting involved in a murder case due to a love affair, an unlucky disc jockey goes through a dirtier commotion that is related to his past.

title: Pokiri
desc: Krishna, a police officer, disguises himself as a thug and joins the mafia in order to wipe out the underworld. Meanwhile, he falls in love with Shruti, an aerobics teacher.

title: Mask
desc: In an attempt to impress Shakthi, Bruce Lee dons a superhero costume and demonstrates his martial arts skills. However, he unexpectedly becomes involved in a police chase.

title: Ayyare
desc: Venkatesam and Anjali are about to get married when her father changes his decision after consulting Prasad, a priest. Venkatesam decides to get in touch with Prasad to know the reason.

title: Dhurandar
desc: The presenter discusses the film 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' in terms of its OTT and television release and also talks about its teaser.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A fun compilation of back-to-back hilarious Telugu movie scenes, bringing nonstop laughter with the funniest moments, comic sequences, and iconic reactions.

title: The Prince
desc: Jeeva, a gangster's son, falls in love with Swarna, daughter of a renowned Carnatic singer. However, in an effort to win her love, he decides to conceal the truth surrounding his family background.

title: Hello Brother
desc: Twins Deva and Ravi Verma are separated at birth by a goon named Misro. Later, they reunite to defeat Mitra, the son of Misro and a miscreant, who seeks revenge against their father, Chakravarthy.

title: Mirchi
desc: Manasa falls in love with Jai after he helps her and manages to win the hearts of her family with his good deeds. However, she is unaware that he belongs to a rival family.

title: I
desc: A bodybuilder and successful model plans revenge after his enemies inject him with a substance that deforms his body.

title: Extra Ordinary Man
desc: Abhinay, a struggling artist, meets the woman of his dreams and changes his aim. However, stumbling upon the chance to star in a movie, Abhinay's life takes a drastic turn.

title: The Warrior
desc: After enduring a ruthless gangster's cruelty, a former doctor transforms into a police officer and returns to his city on a quest for justice.
